intro_cards.title: Formal ある: ございます
intro_cards.body:
ございます is the formal humble/polite form of あります — 'there is / I have' in very polite speech.

• こちらにございます。(It is right here — formal)
• ご質問はございますか？(Do you have any questions?)
• お時間はございますか？(Do you have time? — formal)

Used in: business, customer service, hotels, shops, formal writing

Note: ありがとうございます = polite 'thank you'
(ございます of あります)

In everyday speech, あります is standard.
ございます sounds formal unless in a professional context.
